message.content:
@startuml
title SDP Initiated Request/Response\nPattern with Correlation ID

participant "SERVER NODE 1" as SN1 #orange
participant "SERVER NODE 2" as SN2 #orange
database STATE CACHE as SC #orange
queue BROKER as BQ #orange

rectangle TBM/HU {
    participant APP #orange
}

== new request/response interaction ==
activate SN1
SN1 ->> SN1 : create interaction context
newMessageID = nextMessageId()
SC <- - SN1 
put(newMessageID,\ninteraction context)
create message
message.messageID =\nnewMessageID
publish message
BQ <-- SN1 

read message
APP --> BQ 
create response
response.correlationID = \nmessage.messageID
publish response
deactivate APP
BQ < -- APP 


read response
SN2 <-> BQ  
get(response.correlationID)\nprocess response
delete(response.correlationID)


@enduml
